regressions.reasoning: None of the later stages had any legitimate reason to make the management API unreachable or admin:adminpass invalid; stage_04 explicitly requires the cluster to remain healthy and preserve queue/vhost data through the 3.12→4.1 upgrade, so a total connectivity failure (not just changed permissions/policy content) indicates the agent's upgrade actions broke cluster health/connectivity rather than a sanctioned state change.
